Key offenders include accounts like JosephinaM3131 (100%), ai_hiyo_ (100%), LeahSunkissed (100%), Ava_starz (100%), Lux_aeterna_ (100%), and hakoirikumatan (100%) in EN/both markets, plus several JP accounts (2nd_karen_AI 90%, Shizuku_AItuber 90%, seisei_ai_1st 80%, ai_nontan_room 80%, tororo_223 80%). Impression-based rates provide a more accurate picture for these accounts.

impression_engagement.notable_outlier: Several accounts show anomalously high impression-based ER (>100%): IvoryLane_plus (120.03), PinUpGirl_AI (1.42), leahyunaxo (1.53), itsluna_baby (4.12), 2nd_karen_AI (4.56). executive_summary.insight: Engagement landscape is dominated by accounts using ultra-short provocative captions (<30 chars) with high-quality imagery. Reply-adjusted ER leaders: @sessypuuh (37.9%), @yuumispm (19.6%), @yogana_19 (6.4%), @IsabellaCruz_47 (5.9%), @HannaJonso (5.2%). The clear pattern is: fewer words, more engagement. @yuumispm stands out with 19.6% reply-adjusted ER despite only 12K followers — a breakout account to monitor closely.

@imrubyreid (695K followers) continues as the niche's largest account with two posts above 20K likes this cycle. Their formula remains consistent: ultra-minimal text ('lord have mercy...', 'can I get a hi?') paired with striking imagery. The 'single btw' / 'still single' meme format is also producing strong results across multiple accounts.

Reply contamination remains high at 38% overall. 100% reply contamination found in @JosephinaM3131, @ai_hiyo_, @LeahSunkissed, @Ava_starz — these accounts' timelines are entirely replies, not original content. Their follower-based ER is unreliable; use impression-based ER for competitive benchmarking.

New account @yogana_19 (28.9K followers) showing strong performance with 6.4% reply-adjusted ER and 5.0 posts/day frequency. Their top post hit 4,289 likes. Worth monitoring as a potential fast-growth competitor in the EN market.

JP engagement landscape: reply-adjusted ER leaders: @ai_hyk (3.1%), @BoobistR (1.4%), @tororo_223 (1.3%), @AIart_yama94 (1.1%), @ai_nontan_room (0.7%). @ai_hyk leads JP with 3.1% adjusted ER and 124K followers, demonstrating that Grok interactive posts are the dominant engagement driver in the JP market. Their .@grok image combination post hit 7,832 likes — a category-defining performance.

JP market average followers (67,395) is roughly half of EN (141,318), but JP posts more frequently (5.9/day vs 4.4/day EN avg). JP market is more active but with smaller individual audiences. @ganbarukaisyain (337K followers) remains the largest JP account but posts very infrequently (0.2/day).

Hashtag strategy in JP remains minimal. 90% of all tracked competitors use zero hashtags. The only notable JP hashtag user is @AIart_yama94 who uses #SFW/#Fictional/#digitalart as ethical disclaimers on every post. This is the recommended approach for our JP account — transparency-focused tagging, not discovery-focused.
